lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are functional and the car is in good working order.
Poor condition.

Check out this fantastic find! This car is in good condition and has clearly been well-cared for. It offers a smooth, reliable ride and looks great both inside and out, showing only the expected minor wear that comes with careful use. It's ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and structural repairs to be safely driven. The engine has a persistent overheating issue and a significant head gasket leak, while the transmission slips between gears. The body shows heavy rust along the rocker panels and several large dents from a previous collision. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and the electronics are intermittent. It is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows signs of regular use over the years. The exterior has several visible scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the interior is intact but features some staining on the carpets and minor wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is operational and starts reliably, though it would benefit from a tune-up as there is a minor oil leak and the tires are nearing the end of their tread life. It is a solid choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections and upcoming maintenance needs.

This vehicle is in mint condition. It has been exceptionally well-maintained and shows no signs of wear. The exterior paint is flawless, and the interior is in original, like-new condition. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly.

This exceptional vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and uncompromising care. Presented in peerless aesthetic and mechanical condition, it retains the factory-fresh luster and precision expected of a premier investment-grade automobile. Every surface, from the hand-finished cabin materials to the impeccable exterior coachwork, reflects a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. We invite the most sophisticated buyers to experience a machine that transcends the typical used car, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut.

Hey there! You honestly won’t believe your eyes when you see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been totally babied and looks flawless inside and out, this is the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offered here is an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving straight-six with individual throttle bodies. This example is mechanically flawless, boasting a comprehensive service history including proactive rod bearing replacement and VANOS overhaul. The chassis remains rigid with a reinforced rear subframe, and the Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox provides crisp, tactile engagement. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or panel misalignment. Suspension geometry is dialed to factory specifications, utilizing fresh bushings and dampers for peak lateral grip. This is a true turn-key specimen for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of 'showroom condition.' Every inch of the exterior gleams with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating. There are absolutely no door dings, rock chips, or scratches to be found. Inside, the cabin retains that new-car scent; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any wear or creasing. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been garage-kept and serviced exclusively at the dealership with a complete set of maintenance records included. It drives as tightly as the day it rolled off the lot, with smooth acceleration and precise handling. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is an impeccable, collector-grade example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With its flawless finish and mechanical integrity, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, currently offered in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen has been curated with an uncompromising attention to detail, exhibiting a level of refinement that satisfies the most exacting standards. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior, every aspect of this automobile reflects a history of superior care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier-tier investment. For the discerning client seeking an unparalleled driving experience without compromise, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream! This beauty is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied her since day one, so she’s still got that showroom shine and drives like she just rolled off the lot. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy this amazing ride. Come see it for yourself—you won’t be disappointed!
Offered is an uncompromising example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This high-revving 3.2
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle is the absolute pinnacle of its class, presented in true showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct factory aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, operates with surgical precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a complete, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. With incredibly low mileage and a chassis that has never seen a drop of rain, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as flawlessly as it looks. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this car stands in a league of its own.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently offered in superlative condition. Every aspect of this motorcar—from its pristine exterior finish to its meticulously maintained mechanical components—adheres to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This is an unrivaled acquisition for the discerning driver who demands a showroom-quality experience without compromise.

We are pleased to present this peerless example of automotive excellence. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, both mechanically and aesthetically. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable machine. This is an investment-grade specimen for those who demand uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such pristine condition that it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been incredibly well-loved and meticulously cared for, so you’re getting a ride that’s basically flawless inside and out. If you’ve been looking for that perfect, like-new feel without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see this beauty go to a great home.

This E46 M3 is a concours-level example featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant with its high-revving 8,000 RPM redline and six individual throttle bodies. Mechanically flawless, the Double VANOS system has been professionally overhauled, and the rear subframe has been reinforced to exceed factory specifications. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, feeding power through the original M-Variable differential lock. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the chassis dynamics are perfectly preserved with fresh bushings and factory-spec dampers. This is a collector-grade specimen with zero deferred maintenance and impeccable compression across all six cylinders.
Single owner. Garage kept. Dealer maintained with full records. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Interior is spotless.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, presented in true showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine, factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the heated seats, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all service records documented. The engine bay is detailed and leak-free, while the undercarriage is remarkably clean. Driving this car feels like a trip back to the dealership floor—tight suspension, responsive braking, and seamless shifting. Complete with all original manuals, two keys, and a clean title, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a top-tier example that requires absolutely no additional investment.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. Meticulously maintained and virtually indistinguishable from new, it offers a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless integrity. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care that exceeds expectations, ensuring a definitive driving experience for the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously preserved and mechanically irreproachable, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking uncompromising quality and investment-grade integrity.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to be listing this beauty! Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, it’s basically like driving a brand-new car right off the lot. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it shows—the paint is sparkling and the interior is just flawless. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is! I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love every mile. Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!
This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the iconic S54-powered platform. The high-revving 3.2L
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Mint condition.

Presenting an absolute showroom-standard specimen that defies its age. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a deep-gloss exterior finish that is entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. The interior is a masterclass in preservation; the premium leather remains supple with zero bolster wear, and every tactile surface feels factory-fresh. All onboard technology, including the premium infotainment and driver-assist suites, functions with precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a complete, documented service history and a performance profile that remains as sharp as the day it was first delivered. From the pristine alloy wheels to the spotless engine bay, every detail has been curated for the most discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a rare, turn-key opportunity to own a vehicle that truly looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting its fastidious ownership history. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality.
